HB family
Yesterday
Adi Mama
: https://www.fueladream.com/home/campaign/100083 My son YUVRAJ MEHTA is running this crowdfunding campaign to provide back-to-school kits to children living in rural Maharashtra who go to school. Many of these children walk long distances without proper footwear. They often do not have a proper school bag, and they have to sit on the hard floor at school for long hours. This leads to health issues, poor attendance, and a lack of focus while attending school.  The back-to-school kit that we will give is unique. It contains a school bag, a study mat to sit on, and footwear. The school bag, study mat, and footwear are made out of discarded clothes and shoes which are recycled and then up-cycled. Otherwise, all this material would go into landfills. This back-to-school kit gives them the confidence to attend school regularly and improves their health. This is being done in partnership with the NGO - Greensole Foundation. Each 'Back-To-School Kit' costs just INR 950, including the cost of distribution. So funding INR 4750, for example, will impact five (5) children. Please support this campaign by clicking on the link above and donate with Wallets, UPI, Credit cards/debit cards, etc. This campaign has 80G tax benefits. You will also get feedback on how the funds are spent.
